CustomField.formula: CASE( $Profile.Name, 'SDA Community User', ( SDA_Record_Owner__r.FirstName + ' ' + SDA_Record_Owner__r.LastName), 'SDA Community User Readonly', (SDA_Record_Owner__r.FirstName + ' ' + SDA_Record_Owner__r.LastName), 'SDA Login Community User', (SDA_Record_Owner__r.FirstName + ' ' + SDA_Record_Owner__r.LastName), 'New SDA Login Community User', (SDA_Record_Owner__r.FirstName + ' ' + SDA_Record_Owner__r.LastName), 'SDA Login Community User Readonly', (SDA_Record_Owner__r.FirstName + ' ' + SDA_Record_Owner__r.LastName), 'SPL Community User', (Chase_Record_Owner__r.FirstName + ' ' + Chase_Record_Owner__r.LastName), 'SPL Community User Readonly', (Chase_Record_Owner__r.FirstName + ' ' + Chase_Record_Owner__r.LastName), 'SPL Login Community User', (Chase_Record_Owner__r.FirstName + ' ' + Chase_Record_Owner__r.LastName), 'SPL Login Community User Readonly', (Chase_Record_Owner__r.FirstName + ' ' + Chase_Record_Owner__r.LastName), 'New SPL Login Community User Readonly', (Chase_Record_Owner__r.FirstName + ' ' + Chase_Record_Owner__r.LastName), 'Scotia Bank Community User', (Scotia_Record_Owner__r.FirstName + ' ' + Scotia_Record_Owner__r.LastName) , 'Scotia Bank Community User Readonly', (Scotia_Record_Owner__r.FirstName + ' ' + Scotia_Record_Owner__r.LastName), 'New Scotia Bank Login Community User', (Scotia_Record_Owner__r.FirstName + ' ' + Scotia_Record_Owner__r.LastName), 'Scotia Bank Login Community User', (Scotia_Record_Owner__r.FirstName + ' ' + Scotia_Record_Owner__r.LastName), 'Scotia Bank Login Community User Readonly', (Scotia_Record_Owner__r.FirstName + ' ' + Scotia_Record_Owner__r.LastName), 'New Scotia Bank Login Community User Readonly', (Scotia_Record_Owner__r.FirstName + ' ' + Scotia_Record_Owner__r.LastName), 'Fairstone Community User', (Fairstone_Record_Owner__r.FirstName + ' ' + Fairstone_Record_Owner__r.LastName), 'Fairstone Community User Readonly', (Fairstone_Record_Owner__r.FirstName + ' ' + Fairstone_Record_Owner__r.LastName), 'Goeasy Community User', (Goeasy_Record_Owner__r.FirstName + ' ' + Goeasy_Record_Owner__r.LastName), 'Goeasy Community User Readonly', (Goeasy_Record_Owner__r.FirstName + ' ' + Goeasy_Record_Owner__r.LastName), 'Canadian Tire Community User', (Canadian_Tire_Record_Owner__r.FirstName + ' ' + Canadian_Tire_Record_Owner__r.LastName), 'Money Mart Community User', (Money_Mart_Record_Owner__r.FirstName + ' ' + Money_Mart_Record_Owner__r.LastName), 'Flexiti Community User', (Flexiti_Record_Owner__r.FirstName + ' ' + Flexiti_Record_Owner__r.LastName), (Owner:User.FirstName + ' ' + Owner:User.LastName))
CustomField.label: Insolvency Owner
